title: Moth Court
pitch: Your lantern's brightness dial is loot-magnet, moth-bait and monster-bait all at once.
howto: Wander the night garden and work the brightness dial: each moth species only spirals into the flame at its favorite glow, while bright light also draws hungry shades. Survive to dawn, then weave your catch into light-thread gear, upgrade the lantern and unlock deeper zones.
controls: Drag anywhere to walk. Slide the right-edge dial to set brightness (band ticks show what nearby moths want). Tap II to pause. Desktop: WASD moves, Q/E or mouse wheel dims/brightens.
